description: Create a Talon module in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\scotus_transcriber\ to assist in transcribing Supreme Court cases. Download the Obergefell v. Hodges metadata from https://api.oyez.org/cases/2014/14-556 and save it as 14-556.json. The module must parse advocate names from the JSON to populate a list for voice commands, track an active speaker (defaulting to 'Chief Justice'), and provide actions to update the speaker, record a statement (inserting "[HH:MM] {speaker}: {text}\n" with capitalized text), and insert the case name. Implement voice commands in transcriber.talon to switch speakers using the advocate list, set the speaker to 'Chief Justice', record dictated text, and insert the case name.
